title: hieracium pilosum subsp. melanostylum
intro: Hieracium pilosum subsp. melanostylum is a subspecies of the Hieracium pilosum plant, commonly known as the old man's bonnet or false hawkweed, which belongs to the dandelion family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Hieracium pilosum subsp. melanostylum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory tract infections. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea by infusing its leaves in hot water or as a tincture by extracting its active compounds in a solvent, though further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
